monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes IRGC Targets Near Ahvaz, Iran, for 13th Consecutive Night

— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 26m ago. CENTCOM announces 13th consecutive night of US airstrikes against IRGC targets in Iran, beginning at 6:45 p.m. ET as operations continue to protect commercial shipping.
